title: Treeplacer - Terralith Addon
description: Adds biome specific sapling functionality for Terralith
body:
Adds sapling growth support for Terralith's custom trees.

This datapack is made for Terralith v2.3.5, and has support for almost every biome and tree.

Saplings will only generate custom trees in the appropriate biome, with a few that will generate anywhere:
- Single dark oak saplings will now grow the twilight trees in the dark forest biome.
- 2x2 brown and red mushrooms will grow the mega mushroom variants found in the dark forest biome.

This datapack is an addon for the mod Treeplacer:
https://modrinth.com/mod/treeplacer

Notes:
- The oak trees in Haze Mountains only partially work. Hopefully this can be fixed in the future.
- The enchanted tree in the mirage isles cannot be regrown to prevent growing warped stem without having been to the nether.

Let me know if there are any issues!
